---
title: "Imaging Hub Website launched"
description: "The Imaging Hub website has been launched!"
author: "News"
date: "2026-03-10"
categories: [news]
image: "/files/images/aih_logo_notext.svg"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---


## Summary

On the website you will find information on events, expertise and facilities available in the community, and relevant courses on imaging.

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
